title: 5 in 1 Hair Styler, Magic Styler, 1000W Hair Dryer Brush for Hair Styling, Hot Air Brush with Auto Wrap Air Curler Wand, Hair Straightener Brush, Round Brush Hair Dryer for Volumise, Curls, Style
features: ❥ 【5 in 1 Hot Hair Styler Set】Multifunctional hair dryer brush unleash your creativity and allow you easily become your own stylist and create various styles you want.The 5 in 1 hair dryer includes 1 hair dryer, 2 air curlers in different directions, 1 round blower brush, 1 hair straightening brush, Can be used as a blow-dryer, curling iron, volumizing brush, bang brush, and straightening brush.

❥ 【Upgrade Hot Air Styler】Upgrade lengthening the Air Styler hair Curler wand in the left/right direction, suitable for all long and short hair. The powerful continuous Negative Ionic air flow ensures that the hair is automatically wrapped to the surface of the curling iron, and can be created without overheating, creating volume, smoothness, and natural curls.

❥ 【3 Temp Settings for All Hair Types】The hair styler set has three adjustable temperatures. The low temperature is 50 ℃, the medium temperature is 80 ℃, and the high temperature is 105 ℃. When assembling the blow-drying brush head, this button can also be used to adjust the airspeed, allowing you to freely customize it according to your hair type.

❥【Smooth, Frizz-Free Finish with Heat & Ion Care】Smart heat sensors and 20 million negative ions work together to lock in moisture, tame frizz, and protect hair health. Whether you're boosting volume or smoothing strands, you’ll enjoy soft, glossy results every time—without over-drying.

❥ 【Portable Design】The compact design of this hair styler, makes it highly portable and easy to carry. It can be effortlessly stored in a handbag or travel case, allowing you to style your hair on-the-go and showcase your best look even while traveling.
